## Summary

<!-- One or two lines explaining the change. -->

## Wave / Flag

- Wave: wave-N/<slug>
- Feature flag: u.flags.wave<N>.<slug>
- Rollout plan: internal → alpha → beta → GA

## Type of change

- [ ] New feature (behind flag)
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Docs / tooling
- [ ] Breaking change (explain below)

## Test evidence

- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Integration tests
- [ ] Storybook stories
- [ ] a11y pass
- [ ] i18n / RTL check
- [ ] Screenshots / Loom attached

## Rollback

<!-- How to undo this safely. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Behind u.flags.wave<N> (default off in prod)
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry added under Unreleased
- [ ] Docs updated
- [ ] Telemetry events emitted and documented
